description.en: Full-duplex communication over a single TCP connection. Enables real-time data push from server to client, used by chat apps, live dashboards and collaborative tools.
description.zh: 基于单个TCP连接的全双工通信协议。支持服务器向客户端实时推送数据，用于聊天应用、实时仪表盘和协作工具。

fin.en: Final fragment flag (1=last frame of message)
fin.zh: 最终分片标志 (1=消息的最后一帧)

rsv1.en: Reserved bit 1, must be 0 unless extension negotiated
rsv1.zh: 保留位1，未协商扩展时必须为0

rsv2.en: Reserved bit 2, must be 0 unless extension negotiated
rsv2.zh: 保留位2，未协商扩展时必须为0

rsv3.en: Reserved bit 3, must be 0 unless extension negotiated
rsv3.zh: 保留位3，未协商扩展时必须为0

opcode.zh: 帧类型 (0=延续帧, 1=文本, 2=二进制, 8=关闭, 9=ping, 10=pong)

mask.en: Mask flag (1=payload is masked, required for client-to-server)
mask.zh: 掩码标志 (1=载荷已掩码，客户端到服务器必须为1)

payloadLen.zh: 载荷长度 (0-125直接表示, 126=后续2字节, 127=后续8字节)

extPayloadLen16.en: Extended payload length (16-bit), present when payloadLen=126
extPayloadLen16.zh: 扩展载荷长度 (16位)，payloadLen=126时存在

extPayloadLen64.en: Extended payload length (64-bit), present when payloadLen=127
extPayloadLen64.zh: 扩展载荷长度 (64位)，payloadLen=127时存在

maskingKey.en: 32-bit masking key for payload XOR, present when mask=1
maskingKey.zh: 32位掩码密钥，用于载荷XOR运算，mask=1时存在
